title: Galgamok
content: {{Top|ca|leg}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name="Galgamok" |author= |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer=[[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]]{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} |publisher= |release date= |media type=[[Music/Legends|Song]] |pages= |published in= |genre= }} "'''Galgamok'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] performed by [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]], a band formed during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]–[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' At some point before [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]," including the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. his band made three recordings and a name for themselves with crowd-pleasers such as "Galgamok," which was [[Musician/Legends|sung]] by one of the members, [[Joh Yowza/Legends|Joh Yowza]], who individually quickly became a celebrity. ==Behind the scenes== "Galgamok" was introduced in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article [[Rich Handley]] wrote for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, which was published on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Galgamok |nl=Galgamok }} [[Category:Songs by Evar Orbus and His Galactic Wailers]]
